To obtain Board approval for MTA Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company's ("GCMC") permanent adoption of the rules (the "Rules") governing the conduct and safety of the public in its use of the new Grand Central Madison Terminal ("GCM Terminal").

payload.entity_name: MTA Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company
payload.description: A public benefit corporation and a subsidiary of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority created to operate the Grand Central Madison Terminal

evidence_refs.source_quote: on December 22, 2021, the Metropolitan Transportation Authority created the public benefit corporation subsidiary agency known and MTA Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company ("GCMC")
MTA Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company ("GCMC") is a public benefit corporation and a subsidiary of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority

tool_args.label: MTA Board

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: the new Grand Central Madison Terminal (\"GCM Terminal\")

payload.description: The new 8 track terminal and concourse located below the existing Grand Central Terminal, opened January 2023, extending Long Island Rail Road service

evidence_refs.source_quote: In January 2023, the GCM Terminal opened to the public, extending Long Island Rail Road service directly into the new 8 track terminal and concourse located below the existing Grand Central Terminal ("GCT")

"Grand Central Madison Terminal" means the Grand Central Madison Terminal, including but not limited to all appurtenances, such as the platforms, the concourse, stairways, elevators, escalators and passageways
